title: Lavender Drift
description: A pastel sky overlay that is compatible with Optifine/Skyboxify!
body: ![LogoBanner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc5afee4bfdd929045011b0c02d9f65f04ddbb61_0.webp) # Lavender Drift ![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/lavender-drift?style=for-the-badge) ![Modrinth Game Versions](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/game-versions/lavender-drift?style=for-the-badge) > In this sky overlay, many bright-colored nebulae cover the sky, resulting in a pleasant atmosphere while playing. The pack uses the Optifine format, so it will require a compatibility mod to use. > Recommended: Turn off Sun & Moon [![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/M4M61V7YTQ) ### Issue? Let me know on Discord!
